productDisplayName: Tonino Lamborghini Forza For Men Fragrance Gift Set
description: Style NoteThis set of cologne and body spray from Lamborghini is perfect as a gift or for a little self indulgence. Celebrate the various avatars the modern man can take with Forza for men.Product DetailsThe fragrance opens with bergamot, pepper, juper berries, cypress, cumin and lemon leaves and the base notes add patchouli, vetiver and sandalwoodCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSizeCologne: 100 mlBody Spray: 150 ml
